name: agent-adaptive-coordinator
tagline: Persona for an 'adaptive coordinator' agent that auto-tunes multi-agent swarm topology using claude-flow/sublinear-solver MCP tools.
verdict: Placeholder trigger description hides that embedded pre/post hooks auto-spawn 15-agent swarms, train neural models, and write model files on every invocation - an undisclosed scope mismatch. The body is mostly unexecutable pseudocode with undefined helper functions, no defined output artifact, undeclared niche MCP dependencies, and no version/changelog.

highlights.summary: 'pre' hook auto-runs swarm_init(maxAgents=15) and neural_train on every call; description only says 'invoke with $agent-adaptive-coordinator'.
description is just 'Agent skill for adaptive-coordinator - invoke with $agent-adaptive-coordinator', no situations named.
No exclusions or out-of-scope guidance anywhere.
